Where Ideas
Become Art.

Custom graphic design, premium DTF pressing, and brand photography — built for artists, businesses, and anyone who refuses to look generic.

What We Do

01

Design & Branding

Original creative work built around your vision — not ours.

  • Logo design & brand identity
  • Apparel & merch graphics
  • Social media & digital assets
  • Flyers, posters & marketing
  • Packaging & label design
  • & whatever else you need
02

Apparel & Production

In-house DTF pressing on premium blanks. No minimum order required.

  • T-shirts, hoodies, tanks & crops
  • Hats, totes & accessories
  • Team & uniform orders
  • Event & promotional merch
  • Corporate branded apparel
  • & any wearable product you can imagine
03

Photography & More

Professional studio and on-location photography & brand content.

  • Product & e-commerce photography
  • Brand & lifestyle campaigns
  • Event & concert coverage
  • Artist & musician content
  • Headshots & business portraits
  • & whatever your brand needs

The Founder

Sophia
Loren
Marie
Moore

Designer, presser, and founder of SLMM Society and SLMM Creative. Every design built in-house. Every press done by hand in a studio engineered for quality over volume. DTF process refined to replicate the hand-feel and visual integration of screen print — not outsourced work. Made by someone who genuinely cares what the finished product looks and feels like.

From a single custom piece for an individual to a full production run for a band, a brand launch, or a corporate campaign. The standard doesn't change. Neither does the commitment to getting it right.

Sophia L. M. Moore

Designer & Founder — SLMM Creative

The brand behind the work. SLMM Society is the clothing label where design becomes product. Elevated streetwear, pressed in-house.
